Verified Partners

Authorized brands
you can rely on.

100% Direct Manufacturer Supply

We buy directly from the company depots to eliminate duplicate boards. Every panel shipped carries original invoices and official warranty stickers.

Browse Catalog
Plywood & HDMR Panels

Century Ply

Authorized dealership supplying Century Club Prime, Century Prowud, and architectural veneers. Backed by official manufacturing warranties and QR verification stamps.

Available Inventory
  • Club Prime PWP Plywood
  • Century Prowud HDMR
  • Century Teak Wood Veneers
HDMR & Particle Boards

Action TESA

Top-tier dealership distributing Action TESA Moisture Resistant HDMR boards and laminated particle sheets. Ideal for kitchen modular cores and almirah boxes.

Available Inventory
  • Action TESA HDMR Panels
  • Laminated Particle Sheets
  • TESA Adhesive solutions
Engineered Wood Panels

Novopan

N

Authorized partner supply routes distributing Novopan high-density wood boards and decorative particle overlays.

Available Inventory
  • Novopan Engineered Panels
  • Particle Core Sheets
Premium Local Plywood

Assam Plywood

A

Direct log-sourcing timber partner supplying high-density borer-resistant local hardwood plywood for wardrobes and frames.

Available Inventory
  • Hardwood Plywood BWR
  • Commercial block boards
Decorative Mica Sheets

Black Cobra Laminates

Distributing Black Cobra decorative laminates. Featuring premium textured, suede-finish, and scratch-resistant options.

Available Inventory
  • Textured Mica Laminates
  • Acrylic High-Gloss Sheets
Acrylic & Gloss Sheets

Virgo Laminates

Authorized distribution channel for Virgo luxury mica lines, high gloss laminates, and matching edge band tapes.

Available Inventory
  • Virgo High-Gloss Panels
  • Suede Finish Laminates
Backing Mica Sheets

Vidyalam

V

Economical, solid backing micas supplying local wood workshops and carpenters for wardrobe inner lining sheets.

Available Inventory
  • 0.8mm Inner Lining Mica
  • Basic structural laminates
Cabinet Hinges & Brackets

Mazix

Stocking Mazix auto-hinges, soft-close brackets, and structural architectural door handles.

Available Inventory
  • Hydraulic auto-hinges
  • Door handle sets
Silent Hardware Fittings

HEPO

Authorized dealer of HEPO (a Hettich brand) hardware solutions, supplying silent drawer slides and hydraulic wardrobe lifts.

Available Inventory
  • HEPO Soft-Close Slides
  • Hydraulic Lift-Up brackets
  • Multi-slide wardrobe guides
JagdambaTIMBER WORKS & PLYWOOD

Providing premium lumber, plywood, laminates, and custom cabinetry since 2006. Devoted to master craftsmanship, structural durability, and design heritage.

Showroom Hours
Mon - Sat: 9:00 AM - 8:00 PM
Sunday: Closed
